narrative:
Campbell City has 5,023 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 37.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 31.8 percentage points.
